frontend: Next.js App Router + Tailwind CSS v4 + custom React primitives
storage: Owned server-side SQL persistence via Node built-in node:sqlite (file-backed), Postgres-portable schema
storage_decision: G3 credential discovery found no managed Postgres/Neon DATABASE_URL. To keep a guaranteed-runnable demo with real owned persisted state that survives refresh and process restart, the runnable build uses Node's built-in node:sqlite (zero native build on Node 26). The schema and repository are SQL-standard and portable to Neon Postgres by swapping the driver. This is a recorded G2->G3 cut, not a downgrade of the persistence guarantee.
real_data_source: Owned persisted Red Batch workspace data (SQLite file) plus a UiPath-governed orchestration adapter for case/agent/approval/mutation/verification
real_data_sources: PostgreSQL tables for containment cases, risk signals, affected orders, approvals, packets, and timeline events
UiPath Automation Cloud / Maestro Case for the governed case object and agent orchestration
UiPath/API workflow boundary for order-status mutation and verification
Seeded/imported operational order, lot, and complaint data loaded into the owned database
deployment: Vercel for the product UI and API routes, paired with UiPath Automation Cloud for case orchestration

found.openai_compatible_llm: present (StepFun OpenAI-compatible endpoint; used additively for agent narration only, never as source of truth for matching/mutation/verification)
found.tts: present (MiMo v2.5 TTS; used in G5 for demo narration)
found.web3: present but intentionally unused (no chain/protocol branch selected for this product)

credential_discovery.result: partial: real persistence + optional real LLM narration available; UiPath cloud runs in honest local-governance mode with transparent integration status

live_provider_smoke.command: npm run smoke (runs hero RB-2049 full-stop and ambiguity RB-7712 review against the persisted store + governance adapter)

why_this_stack: This is the simplest stack that keeps Red Batch as a real case product: Next.js gives a fast product shell and server-side secret boundary, PostgreSQL gives owned persisted state and reopenable packets, and UiPath remains the governed orchestration and execution layer for the hero loop.
cut_if_time_runs_out: PDF packet export if in-app packet view is already persistent and inspectable
BPMN-backed deterministic subflows beyond the primary containment mutation
Analytics, portfolio dashboards, and multi-case management beyond a minimal queue
Adjacent case templates beyond the primary bad-batch path and one ambiguity branch
